name: Marion State Bank
description_short: Marion State Bank is an FDIC-insured community bank established in 1906, serving customers in Marion, Texas with debit card services, check management, and fraud prevention tools.
description_long:
Marion State Bank has operated as a community financial institution since 1906, rooted in Marion, Texas. The bank is FDIC-insured and positioned as "The Home of Service and Appreciation," emphasizing long-term customer relationships and local banking services.

The bank offers core consumer banking services including debit card accounts, check ordering and reordering, online banking access, and basic financial services accessible through their website and physical location at 301 West San Antonio Street in Marion. They provide mobile banking capabilities and customer support via phone at (830) 420-2331 or (830) 914-4504 for metro callers.

Marion State Bank distinguishes itself through robust fraud prevention and security tools. All debit cards come equipped with SecurLOCK Equip, a mobile app that enables real-time card control including the ability to freeze/unfreeze cards, set spending limits, restrict usage by location or channel (in-store, online, mobile, ATM), and receive instant transaction alerts via 2-way texting. They also offer Card Suite Lite as a free supplementary app. The bank demonstrates consumer education focus through their website, providing detailed information about common scams including warrant scams, jugging, and romance scams, and explicitly state they will refuse wire transfers if they suspect a customer is a romance scam victim.

As a small community bank, Marion State Bank's primary limitation is geographic reach and service scope—they appear to serve primarily local customers in the Marion, Texas area rather than offering statewide or national banking services. The website provides no information about savings accounts, CDs, credit products, business banking, mortgages, or other services beyond basic checking and debit card functionality. Customers seeking comprehensive banking services, competitive deposit rates, or investment products may need to look elsewhere.
services: FDIC-insured checking accounts with debit card issuance
SecurLOCK Equip mobile app for debit card control (freeze/unfreeze, spending limits, location restrictions)
Card Suite Lite free mobile app for card management
Online banking access with security passcodes
Debit card fraud alerts via 2-way SMS texting
Transaction monitoring and spending channel controls (in-store, online, mobile, ATM)
Phone banking support at two numbers
Wire transfer services with fraud prevention review
FDIC Insurance Calculator tool on website
pros: All debit cards include SecurLOCK Equip with real-time fraud alerts and 2-way texting capability
Customers can freeze or unfreeze debit cards instantly via mobile app
Debit card spending can be restricted by location, channel (in-store/online/ATM/mobile), and transaction limits
Bank will proactively refuse wire transfers if they suspect a customer is a romance scam victim
Comprehensive fraud education resources on website covering warrant scams, jugging, and romance scams
Established community bank with 118+ years of history since 1906
cons: No information provided about savings accounts, money market accounts, or CDs on website
No mention of credit products, business banking, mortgages, or lending services
Limited geographic reach—appears to serve only Marion, Texas area without evidence of additional branches or online-only access
Website provides no information about account fees, minimum balances, or interest rates
No evidence of business banking, investment services, or comprehensive financial products beyond basic checking

contact.address: 301 W San Antonio St, Marion, TX 78124

best_for: Customers in Marion, Texas seeking a local community bank with strong fraud protection
Individuals prioritizing debit card security and real-time transaction control via mobile app
Consumers concerned about fraud who want a bank actively monitoring wire transfer requests for scam indicators
diagnosis: Marion State Bank is best for local Marion, Texas residents who want a traditional community bank with industry-leading debit card fraud protection and real-time card controls. The primary caveat is that the bank's website reveals limited service offerings beyond basic checking—no savings accounts, credit products, mortgages, or business banking are mentioned, making it unsuitable for customers seeking comprehensive banking services.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 301 W San Antonio St, Marion, TX 78124
